data.name: Love and Sex: Second Base - Shawn's story
data.detailed_description:
Part of the Love & Sex franchise


關於此遊戲

Love & Sex: Second Base - Shawn's story is a dating sim where a nerdy guy (hopefully you) gets to seduce three beautiful but challenging women.

Shawn is a clerk in an electronics store, but though he's even surrounded by beautiful girls, his love life is in disarray.

His roommate, Palla, is mooching off him, her best friend, Audrey, is making fun of him, and his coworker, Amy, has no respect for him whatsoever. 

Will you be able to help Shawn find love and avoid the pitfalls of dating, or will he end up alone and unhappy?

Basically, his life (and love life) are yours to control!

The aim of the game?

To get lucky with the partner of your choice!

Well, that and meeting, dating, and then getting it on in as many places, situations, and positions as you can imagine.

Keep it casual or get serious – even ask them to marry you or start a family together.

The choice is yours.

Not only that, you can choose to be a faithful partner or play away the first chance you get. But remember, people talk, and you could end up getting caught out…

Love & Sex: Second Base - Shawn's story is a dating game that allows you to do all of this by building your stats, getting to know your conquests, and rewarding the player for the work they put in to win their hearts.

As you spend time playing the game, your character grows in experience.

Experience all four seasons as you work and play alongside your three potential love interests, each with their own personality and lives to lead.

Call them, text them, give them gifts and compliments.

And, of course, ask them out on dates – maybe even get past Second base!

  • Free roaming

  • Be a chad, a scumbag or a good guy

  • Go vanilla or go kinky

  • Get in polyamorous relationships or be faithful to your one true love

  • Go out with your dates, give them gifts and bring them home

  • Send friendly, sexy or dirty texts to the girls & guys

  • Call the girls to know their location, have a booty call or just chat

  • Talk about a dozen subjects or chat about nothing specific

  • Buy and equip clothes and accessories to be more charming

  • Go to work and earn money

  • Get girls pregnant and ask them in marriage

  • Get your girl pierced if you like it!

  • Built-in hint systems

data.short_description: Become roommates with the gorgeous Palla, seduce her bratty BFF Audrey, or get frisky with Amy, your goth coworker, in this beautiful 18+ dating sim. Level up your stats, sharpen your game, and roam the city to meet three sexy waifus. Beat the odds and maybe—just maybe—you’ll find love… and sex!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.10 or later
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit or Apple silicon through Rosetta 2
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: x86_64
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or later
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: OS X 10.10 or later
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit or Apple silicon through Rosetta 2
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space

Minimum:

  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit
